configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Fast iteration: Ninja scheduling, ccache object reuse, no -O (compile-test/behavior suite needs neither optimization nor NDEBUG). Per-header isolation checks OFF — the ~800 per-header ctests are the slow part of a cold run; use the `ci` preset for the full gate.

configurePresets.name: ci
configurePresets.displayName: CI (mirrors the GitHub Actions cpp job)
configurePresets.description: Local mirror of the GitHub Actions fast gate: per-header isolation checks ON (the ~800 per-header ctests), X3D_CPP_WERROR=ON (warnings become errors, the merge gate). Use `mise run build-ci` to drive the same gate locally before pushing.
